name: Egg Ribbon Soup with Shrimp and Spinach (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces peeled and deveined shrimp, cut into 1/2 inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the chicken broth to a boil in a medium saucepan.
2. Add the shrimp to the soup and bring back to a boil.
3. Add the spinach and bring the mixture back to a simmer.
4. Pour the beaten eggs into the soup in a steady stream. The eggs will curdle into ribbon-shaped strands.
5. Season the soup with salt and pepper to taste, then remove from heat.
6. Ladle the soup into bowls and drizzle a few drops of sesame oil or chili oil/paste as desired.
7. Add lime juice if you prefer.
